Effective Date of RepealRepeal applicable to the 2005 and subsequent crops of tobacco, see , set out as an Effective Date note under .section 643 of Pub. L. 108–357section 518 of this title
Short TitleAct , which was classified to this chapter, was popularly known as the “Tobacco Control Act”.Apr. 25, 1936

Savings Provision, , , provided that:Pub. L. 108–357, title VI, § 614118 Stat. 1524Oct. 22, 2004“The amendments made by this subtitle [subtitle A (§§ 611–614) of title VI of , amending sections 609, 1282, 1301, 1303, 1314h, 1361, 1371, 1373, 1375, 1378, 1379, 1428, 1433c–1, and 1441 of this title and , Commerce and Trade, repealing sections 511r, 515 to 515k, 625, 1311 to 1314, 1314–1, 1314b, 1314b–1, 1314b–2, 1314c to 1314j, 1315, 1316, 1445, 1445–1, and 1445–2 of this title, and repealing provisions set out as a note under ] shall not affect the liability of any person under any provision of law so amended with respect to the 2004 or an earlier crop of each kind of tobacco.”Pub.
